seo_title: ElevenLabs' Music Generation Model Can Switch Genres Mid-Track
meta_description: Discover how ElevenLabs' new music generation model can switch genres mid-track, and explore its potential impact on the music industry.
body_html:
Direct answer: ElevenLabs' new music generation model can switch genres mid-track, allowing users to regenerate a section of a song without affecting the rest of the track.

Key FeaturesRegenerate sections of songs without affecting the entire trackSwitch between genres seamlesslyHigh-quality audio outputTechnical DetailsFeatureDescriptionAudio OutputHigh-quality audio with minimal distortionGenre SwitchingSeamless switching between genres without affecting the trackPotential ImpactElevenLabs' music generation model has the potential to revolutionize the music industry by providing users with more creative freedom and flexibility.

source.title: ElevenLabs’ new music-generation model can switch genres mid-track
source.summary: ElevenLabs has developed a new music-generation model that allows users to regenerate a specific section of a song, such as a verse or chorus, without altering the rest of the track's genre or style. This feature enables artists and producers to experiment with different musical elements within an existing composition. The model can switch genres mid-track, giving users more creative control over their music.
